allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys content = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Find relevant classes import re # Make it more readable by adding newlines after {, }, ; # Search for specific classes classes = [''scFreeformBox'', ''scPreviewFrame'', ''scRight'', ''scLeft'', ''scSurface'', ''scImg'', ''sticker-embed-modal'', ''scWrap'', ''overflow''] for c in classes: idx = content.find\(c\) while idx != -1: # Show context around it start = max\(0, idx - 20\) end = min\(len\(content\), idx + 200\) print\(f''--- Found ""{c}"" at pos {idx} ---''\) print\(content[start:end]\) print\(\) idx = content.find\(c, idx + 1\) ")
